## Summary
A concise description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the desired behavior or approach.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Module
Which module(s) would this feature affect?
- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Employees
- [ ] Attendance
- [ ] Leave
- [ ] Payroll
- [ ] Recruitment
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Training
- [ ] Policy
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any other details, mockups, or references.
